name: Salesloft
description: A sales engagement platform competing directly with Outreach. Salesloft helps sales teams automate outreach, manage deals, and gain AI-powered insights across the revenue cycle. Known for its user-friendly interface and strong coaching features.
whyUseIt: Salesloft combines sales engagement (sequences and cadences) with deal management (pipeline and forecasting) and conversation intelligence (call recording and analysis). This all-in-one approach means fewer tools and more cohesive data. Many mid-market and enterprise teams choose Salesloft for its balance of power and usability.
aiCapabilities: Salesloft's AI analyses call recordings for coaching insights, scores deal health, suggests optimal sequence timing, and generates recommended next actions based on buyer engagement patterns.
funnelPosition: Full funnel — from prospecting through deal management to renewal
sellerWorkflow: SDRs execute cadences and make calls through the dialler. AEs use deal intelligence to track opportunities. Managers use conversation intelligence to coach reps on recorded calls.
managerExpects: Cadences executed consistently, calls logged and recorded, deal stages updated, and engagement data reviewed weekly to optimise sequences.
demoDescription: Run through a cadence, use the integrated dialler to make a call, review conversation intelligence from a recorded call, and check deal health scores in the pipeline view.

vocabulary.definition: Salesloft's term for a multi-step outreach sequence — similar to Outreach's 'sequence'.
Salesloft's AI-powered workflow that prioritises and recommends the most impactful actions for each rep each day.

beginnerMistakes: Not recording calls — losing valuable coaching and review data
Running too many cadences simultaneously and losing track of who's receiving what
Ignoring the Rhythm recommendations that surface the highest-priority actions
